nasb.text: And wine which makes man’s heart glad, So that he may make his face glisten with oil, And food which sustains man’s heart.

esv.text: and wine to gladden the heart of man, oil to make his face shine and bread to strengthen man’s heart.

cnv.text: 又有酒使人心歡喜， 有油使人容光煥發， 有糧加添人的心力。

ccb.text: 有沁人心怀的醇酒、 滋润容颜的膏油、 增强活力的五谷。

csbs.text: 你用酒使人心里欢喜， 用油使人脸带光泽， 用粮使人心中振作。
